free_text: Giant E1 resonances in 8Be from the reaction
in vacuum at the target site. The most successful
targets were deposited on very thin (5-10 mu-g/cm**2)
Plastic scintillator which surrounds the main
NaI crystal and is operated in anticoincidence.
